findings.title: Public database endpoint
findings.remediation: Disable public access and move connectivity to private subnets.

findings.title: Hardcoded token in environment file
findings.remediation: Rotate the value and move it to a managed secret store.

findings.title: S3 bucket versioning disabled
findings.remediation: Enable bucket versioning and lifecycle rules.

findings.title: Missing resource limits
findings.remediation: Define resource requests and limits per container.

findings.title: Resource tags missing owner
findings.remediation: Add an owner tag for cost and ownership tracking.
